entries.summary: System project manager activated for first time. Vault initialized at vault/projects/system/. SELF_GENERATION.md created with daily hunt (9AM/2PM EST), weekly review (Fri 5PM EST), and daily health check (7AM EST) schedules.

entries.summary: Daily health check complete. System: 46% memory (healthy), 4 CPU cores, ~13h uptime. Governance: 0 active managers, 17 workers registered (0 active), 17 open proposals, 62 pending tasks in queue. No escalations.
